context7.description: Resolves library IDs and fetches up-to-date documentation for Spring Boot, Angular, and other dependencies. Use 'resolve-library-id' to find the Context7-compatible library ID, then 'get-library-docs' to fetch focused documentation. Prevents hallucination of outdated APIs.

playwright.description: Browser automation for E2E testing the Angular frontend. Can navigate pages, interact with elements, take screenshots, and validate UI behavior. Uses accessibility tree — no vision model required.

postgres.description: Direct PostgreSQL access for schema inspection, query execution, and data debugging. Connects to the TaskForge Docker PostgreSQL instance.
